docs.title: Taylor Expansion Project
docs.text: Welcome to the documentation! This project uses Numba to calculate Taylor series expansions quickly.

docs.title: Usage
docs.text:
from hello_numba.taylor_expansion import taylor_expansion_sin

result = taylor_expansion_sin(0.5, 5)
print(result)
